## WNN

```{r wnn-prep, include=FALSE}
n_cells <- ncol(scMultiData)
red_used <- intersect(c("pca", "adt.pca", "lsi"), names(scMultiData@reductions))
weight_cols <- grep("\\.weight$", colnames(scMultiData@meta.data), value = TRUE)
has_wsnn <- "wsnn_res.0.5" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)
cluster_col <- if (has_wsnn) {
  "wsnn_res.0.5"
} else if ("seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)) {
  "seurat_clusters"
} else NULL
```

**Weighted Nearest Neighbor integration**

- **Reductions integrated:** `r paste(red_used, collapse = ", ")`
- **WNN cells:** `r format(n_cells, big.mark = ",")`
- **Per-modality weights:** `r if (length(weight_cols) > 0) paste(weight_cols, collapse = ", ") else "n/a"`

### WNN UMAP {.tabset}

#### By Sample

```{r wnn-umap-sample, echo=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=7}
if ("wnn.umap" %in% names(scMultiData@reductions)) {
  p <- DimPlot(scMultiData, reduction = "wnn.umap",
               group.by = "Sample", raster = FALSE) +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1) +
    ggtitle("WNN UMAP - by Sample")
  print(p)
}
```

#### By WNN cluster

```{r wnn-umap-cluster, echo=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=7}
if ("wnn.umap" %in% names(scMultiData@reductions) && !is.null(cluster_col)) {
  p <- DimPlot(scMultiData, reduction = "wnn.umap",
               group.by = cluster_col, raster = FALSE,
               label = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1) +
    ggtitle(paste("WNN UMAP -", cluster_col))
  print(p)
}
```

### Per-modality weights

```{r wnn-weights-vln, echo=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
if (length(weight_cols) > 0 && !is.null(cluster_col)) {
  p <- VlnPlot(scMultiData, features = weight_cols,
               group.by = cluster_col, pt.size = 0, ncol = length(weight_cols))
  print(p)
}
```

```{r wnn-weights-feat, echo=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=4 * ceiling(length(weight_cols)/3)}
if (length(weight_cols) > 0 && "wnn.umap" %in% names(scMultiData@reductions)) {
  p <- FeaturePlot(scMultiData, features = weight_cols,
                   reduction = "wnn.umap", raster = FALSE,
                   ncol = min(3L, length(weight_cols))) &
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1) &
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C")
  print(p)
}
```
